The Residence

A two-bedroom residence on the first floor of Manastiri Bay, opening through a full loggia to the resort and the bay beyond. A generous living and dining space sits at the heart of the home, with two private bedrooms and a covered loggia for shaded outdoor living — the Albanian Riviera lived at an easy pace, between Lake Butrint and the Ionian Sea.

FROM THE GROUND UP

Watch Manastiri take shape

Filmed on site over the course of construction — the frame rising, the terraces forming, the façade closing in. A rare look at how a residence of this quality is actually built.
